text:
There's nothing I love more than going bird watching.

I'd walk anywhere just to see birds. There are places that I can't pronounce anymore.

We took that canoe trip. Birds I thought I knew I'd always see.

But then we saw some I'd never seen. Or perhaps I'd heard them. There're these birds.

Okay. My husband thinks I need to stop. I think I need those berries.

But I think I found something.

I think I found some. My eyes? Yes.

They'd been picking berries. I think they're pretty.

We take birds home. And they feed them.


They want me.

I find my little house.

Now I keep birds.

They come.

They perch.

I give them berries.


I find love.




That.



I write novels.


That's my favorite bird.


What do you think?


That's my bird.


They say my husband loves his.



I think I'll keep him.



That's why I fly...


Just a little
